I

isAntennaId() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadOption
Whether to return antenna id.
isConnected() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.RfidManager
Check if the device is connected.
isData() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadOption
Whether to return addition data.
isFrequency() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadOption
Whether to return frequency.
isProtocol() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadOption
Whether to return protocol type.
isReadCount() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadOption
Whether to return read times.
isRssi() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadOption
Whether to return RSSI.
isTimestamp() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadOption
Whether to return timestamp.
